relative_path: Researchers Visit/Prof Iain McNeish visit to Helsinki/Agenda of Iain McNeish visit.docx
full_text:
Schedule for Prof Iain McNeish’s visit to University of Helsinki

Hosts:

Fernando Perez +358 44 9264369

Anniina Färkkilä +358 50 5967786

Joonas Jukonen +358 50 5748092

Wed May 7th

Arrival AY1338 18:10 LHR - 23:00 HEL

Hotel Scandic Park, Mannerheimintie 46, 00260 Helsinki

(https://maps.app.goo.gl/TDYcVVCDX6Le5Zh89)

Thursday May 8th

Biomedicum Helsinki, Haartmaninkatu 8

https://maps.app.goo.gl/xcL8CfpM7eSF3fx79

11:30-12:00 Welcome to our institute and laboratory

12:00-13:00 Student lunch hosted by Fernando

13:00-14.00 Meeting with Liisa Kauppi

14:00-15.00 Meeting with Anniina

15:10-15:30 Gathering before your seminar with coffee and bun

15:30-16:30 Your talk as part of the iCAN seminars

16:30-17:30 Meeting with Anna Vähärautio

19.00-22:00 Dinner with Anniina, Liisa, Anna, and Jaana Oikkonen

At Ravintola Nokka, Kanavanranta 7 F, 00160 Helsinki

(https://nokkahelsinki.fi/, https://maps.app.goo.gl/kaYHawexDLfiucNv6)

Friday May 9th

Biomedicum Helsinki, Haartmaninkatu 8

https://maps.app.goo.gl/xcL8CfpM7eSF3fx79

11:00-11.30 Meeting with Anniina and Fernando on Finnish defense protocol

11:30-12.30 Lunch with Anniina and researchers

12.30-13:00 Gathering at Liisa’s office in preparation of the thesis defense

13:00-15:30 Fernando's doctoral thesis defense

15:30-16:30 Toast and small gathering after defense

16:30-17:30 Break

18:00-Late night Fernando's Karonkka, formal dinner and celebration in your honor

At Teatterimuseo, Tallberginkatu 1, 00180 Helsinki

(https://www.teatterimuseo.fi/, https://maps.app.goo.gl/z24WMimmgL2s7fXc8)

Saturday May 10th

Departure AY1331 08:00 HEL - 09:10 LHR
